# Plan - 2026-06-10

Source research: `.github/research/2026-06-10-research.md`

## Context

Backlog state at planning time:
- Open issues with `auto-implement` label: 0 (none of the 06-06/06-07 items
  carry the label even though research treats them as "filed").
- Open issues with `enhancement` label only: 30+ (#702 / #703 / #710 / #714
  / #716 / #720 / #721 / #722 / #723 / #724 / #726 / #727 / #728 / #729 /
  #731 / #732 / #733 / #734 / #738 / #740 / #742 etc.).

The research mentions issues by number; those issues exist and are open with
`enhancement`, but the engineering pipeline (`auto-implement.yml`) queries
`labels=auto-implement` and therefore picks up nothing. Two paths forward:

1. Re-label the existing backlog (out of scope here - that is a management
   task, not planning).
2. File the research's four NEW items with the proper `auto-implement,
   enhancement` combo so the engineering pipeline has fresh, well-scoped
   work. This plan does (2).

All four new items have file-path-level grounding in the research and are
verified against the live tree (`src/tool/tools/read-office.ts:36`,
`src/tool/tools/task.ts:182-188`, `src/cli/program.ts` (38 lines, no version
check), `src/cli/tui/components/MarkdownRenderer.tsx:67`). No duplicates
found in current `auto-implement,state:open` listing (which is empty).

## Issues created

| # | Title | Size | Category |
|---|-------|------|----------|
| #750 | [tool] Add .ods spreadsheet support to read-office | small (~2h) | tool |
| #751 | [tool] Resolve custom subagents in task tool registry lookup | small/medium (~5h) | tool |
| #748 | [command] CLI startup update-notifier with 24h cache | small (~3h) | command |
| #749 | [tool] Incremental streamed-markdown render in TUI | medium (~6h) | tool |

The 5th candidate (planning-metric `auto-implement-issues-open /
closed-7d`) is recorded in the research as Recommendation #5 but is
explicitly a `role-management` deliverable (not engineering), so it is
not filed as an `auto-implement` issue here.

## Out of scope this cycle

- Reference-repo rotation (continuedev -> sst/opencode). Recommendation
  #4 in the research; belongs in a `docs(ci)` PR touching
  `.github/prompts/agent1-research-system.md`, not `auto-implement`.
- Re-prioritising the existing backlog (#720, #710, #721, #703 etc.) for
  engineering. Recommendation #1; engineering-agent dispatch order is
  managed by labels, not this plan.

## Verification commands

```bash
gh issue list --label auto-implement --state open --json number --jq 'length'
# Expected: 4 (the items created today)
```
